selection_policy.rule: Choose official LoCoMo category-1/2 QA items with short explicit answers and direct evidence ids, then freeze them into a compact-answer slice with benchmark-answer retention as the target field.

items.subject: Caroline / Melanie
context_messages: [D2:7] Melanie: Thanks, Caroline. It's still a work in progress, but I'm doing my best. My kids are so excited about summer break! We're thinking about going camping next month. Any fun plans for the summer?
[D2:8] Caroline: Researching adoption agencies — it's been a dream to have a family and give a loving home to kids who need it.
[D2:9] Melanie: Wow, Caroline! That's awesome! Taking in kids in need - you're so kind. Your future family is gonna be so lucky to have you!

raw_facts.value: Adoption agencies

items.subject: John / Maria
items.query_text: Who did Maria have dinner with on May 3, 2023?
context_messages: [D13:15] John: We've all been helping and supporting each other during boot camp - cheering each other on during workouts and providing emotional support outside them. It's been amazing witnessing us come together and be there for each other.
[D13:16] Maria: Wow, John! It's great when you have that kind of support. My mom and I made some dinner together last night!
[D13:17] John: Thanks, Maria. Having good support is key. Appreciate you being there for me. What do you have in this spread? Looks delicious! I made this apple pie for the kids yesterday too!

raw_facts.value: her mother

items.subject: Tim / John
items.query_text: When was John in Seattle for a game?
context_messages: [D3:18] Tim: Wow, amazing view! Where's that? What's got you so excited?
[D3:19] John: It's Seattle, I'm stoked for my game there next month! It's one of my favorite cities to explore - super vibrant!
[D3:20] Tim: Cool! What do you love about Seattle?

[D5:1] Tim: Hey John! Long time no see! Been super busy lately. Guess what? Just skyped with that Harry Potter fan I met in CA and had a great time. We talked characters and maybe collab-ing - so cool to talk to someone who gets it. You? Anything new going on?

[D5:2] John: Hi Tim! Nice to hear from you. Glad you could reconnect. As for me, lots of stuff happened since we last talked. Last week I had a crazy game - crazy intense! We won it by a tight score. Scoring that last basket and hearing the crowd cheer was awesome!
[D5:3] Tim: Nice work! Bet it felt awesome to score that basket and have the crowd going wild. Must have been such an adrenaline rush! Did you manage to capture any other photos from the game?

raw_facts.value: early August, 2023

items.subject: Audrey / Andrew
items.query_text: Which year did Audrey adopt the first three of her dogs?
context_messages: [D1:6] Andrew: Cute little guys! What are their names and how long have you had them?
[D1:7] Audrey: I've had them for 3 years! Their names are Pepper, Precious and Panda. I can't live without my little ones!
[D1:8] Andrew: That's awesome! Have you always wanted a dog, even with living in the city? Can they still go on adventures?

items.subject: James / John
items.query_text: Which recreational activity was James pursuing on March 16, 2022?
context_messages: [D1:25] John: It will be great to work with you, James.
[D1:26] James: I'll be looking forward to it. By the way, yesterday I went bowling and got 2 strikes. I love bowling!

[D1:27] John: I'm sure you're very good at this. Unfortunately, I can’t share my love for him with you, my fingers are too big. Perhaps I should take up exercise, at least start going for a run in the morning. And I also don’t like bowling itself, to be honest.

raw_facts.value: bowling

items.subject: Deborah / Jolene
items.query_text: What kind of project was Jolene working on in the beginning of January 2023?
context_messages: [D1:1] Deborah: Hey Jolene, nice to meet you! How's your week going? Anything fun happened?
[D1:2] Jolene: Hi Deb! Good to meet you! Yeah, my week's been busy. I finished an electrical engineering project last week - took a lot of work, but it's done now. Anything fun happening for you?
[D1:3] Deborah: Congrats! Last week I visited a place that holds a lot of memories for me. It was my mother`s old house.
